summary: The F1 fix (pinning `prefers-color-scheme: light` via CDP in `test/application_system_test_case.rb`) was already committed in iteration 5 and is still in place. I verified it actually works: this machine's OS is in Dark mode (the exact repro condition in the feedback), and the theme toggle system test now passes deterministically (7 assertions, 0 failures) thanks to that pin — confirmed by temporarily removing a stale `chromedriver` from PATH so Selenium Manager could resolve a Chrome-compatible driver (a local machine quirk, unrelated to the code). No source changes were needed for this iteration since the blocker was already resolved; I only verified it via `bin/rails test test/system/theme_toggle_test.rb`, which passed with 0 errors.
